title: Purix
body:
# 💜 Purix Resource Pack  
### 1.21+

![Screenshot of texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ccfd85602925e8b8c733ae5ac168637e091f9a1.png)

---

## 📖 Description

Purix is a beautiful and sweet purple texture pack designed to preserve the core structure of vanilla Minecraft while providing competitive advantages and enhanced visual appeal.  

It keeps the original Minecraft feeling intact, but improves clarity, smoothness, and overall aesthetics — especially for Competitive PvP (CPvP).

---

## ⬇️ How to Install

1. Download the `.zip` file  
2. Move it into your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder  
3. Launch Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs  
4. Enable **Purix** and enjoy 💜
